statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); git_status=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$git_status" ]; then git_info=" $(printf "\033[38;5;220m")${branch}$(printf "\033[0m")"; else git_info=" $(printf "\033[38;5;76m")${branch}$(printf "\033[0m")"; fi; fi; node_ver=""; if command -v node &>/dev/null; then node_ver=" $(printf "\033[38;5;74m")node:$(node -v | sed "s/v//")$(printf "\033[0m")"; fi; printf "$(printf "\033[38;5;39m")%s$(printf "\033[0m") in $(printf "\033[38;5;45m")%s$(printf "\033[0m")%s%s" "$model" "$cwd" "$git_info" "$node_ver"'
